title: ブライトお嬢様は怖いものなし？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I find myself visiting an amusement park
owned and operated by Mejiro Bright's parents.

text_block_list.name: Manager
text_block_list.text:
Ah, welcome, Miss Bright! This year's haunted
house event is truly something! I guarantee that
you'll jump right out of your skin!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Teehee! I'm very much looking forward to it. ♪ In
fact, I'd like to experience it right now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's been invited specifically to observe this
year's haunted house before it opens to the
public.

text_block_list.name: Amusement Park Staff
text_block_list.text:
Miss Bright has entered the venue! She's currently
heading east at a walking speed of twenty-five
meters per minute!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Mejiro Bright inside the attraction, I'm taken
to the haunted house's control room. Stepping
inside, who do I see watching the camera feeds
but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I wonder if Bright'll get spooked...
choice_data_list: What are you two doing here?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
We called you in as an advisor because we
wanted to test our tactics on someone like Bright!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It's true, though. I don't think I've ever seen Bright
surprised by anything.

text_block_list.name: Manager
text_block_list.text:
Precisely! We've tried countless times to give Miss
Bright a good scare inside our haunted house, but
with no success whatsoever.

text_block_list.name: Manager
text_block_list.text: Howwwever! We've truly outdone ourselves this year! Why, I'd say it's the finest work I've ever produced!

text_block_list.name: Manager
text_block_list.text:
This attraction's fright factor is so extreme that I
anticipate even Miss Bright will have the time of
her life!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like this manager's whole career is riding
on today's results. We turn to the monitors to
watch Mejiro Bright's progress...

text_block_list.name: Amusement Park Staff
text_block_list.text:
Miss Bright has emerged from the abandoned
hospital area, and she's smiling! Our first line of
defense has been breached!

text_block_list.name: Manager
text_block_list.text:
Remain calm! We anticipated a challenge!
Prepare to deploy Madam Bloody-Muscles!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Ah, so the time's come. I wonder whether this will
finally scare Bright...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
She's a blood-splattered doll! Dober designed her
face, and I oversaw the construction of her body!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: She's horrendous even at first glance, and she's super realistic, so even Bright should be in for a shock!

text_block_list.name: Manager
text_block_list.text:
Not yet! Wait until she's right at the drop point! In
three, two, one—deploy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ka-thunk!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh my... You're a doll, aren't you? I must say, you
have quite the lovely face. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
And your build is utterly robust. Why, your
muscles are on par with those of my sister Ryan's,
in fact. Teehee! ♪

text_block_list.name: Amusement Park Staff
text_block_list.text:
Miss Bright is now petting the doll! I, I've never
known a guest to behave like this...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...I may have made the doll's face prettier than
necessary.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I think maybe I was too particular about the
muscles, too...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright proceeds through the haunted
house, casually taking its various surprises in her
stride...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Um, Ryan? We're not the only ones here who
know Bright fairly well...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's right! We've got another Bright expert
right here!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Her trainer might have the inside scoop on
what gives Bright the heebie-jeebies!

text_block_list.name: Manager
text_block_list.text:
Please, Trainer! Assume the role of chief
frightener and scare Miss Bright, I beg of you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The manager goes briefly airborne before landing
on all fours at my feet. Unable to refuse such an
impassioned request, I find myself being taken to
a small room...

text_block_list.name: Manager
text_block_list.text:
Wow, Trainer. You look horrifying... That's truly
some Hollywood-level zombie makeup! It's as if
you've been underground for years!

text_block_list.name: Manager
text_block_list.text:
Now, it's time to put you before Miss Bright!
Commence "Operation: Final T"!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Go all-out! If you can dream it, you can do it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Let me see... The exit door should be just around
this corner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Kr-chak

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As instructed, I jump out in front of Mejiro Bright
at the perfect moment and do my best zombie
impression!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh, hello there, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: You're dressed as a zombie, aren't you? You look very authentic!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Care to accompany me to the exit? ♪ I'd love to
see your makeup under proper lighting.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Operation: Final T has failed...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After Mejiro Bright leaves the haunted house, we
come clean to her about our plan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
So, yeah, sorry we kept all that a secret and tried
to scare you, Bright!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Me too. I felt a little guilty about what we were
doing, but the manager insisted I keep quiet...
choice_data_list: Sorry for going along with it!
Sorry for going along with it!
But you didn't get scared at all...
But you didn't get scared at all...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Me too. I felt a little guilty about what we were
doing, but the manager insisted I keep quiet...
choice_data_list: Sorry for going along with it!
Sorry for going along with it!
But you didn't get scared at all...
But you didn't get scared at all...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
In other words, the three of you were working
together purely to give me a big surprise, yes?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to all of your efforts, I enjoyed my
haunted house experience to the fullest. Thank
you ever so much. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
If I may, Trainer, regarding your costume and
makeup...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Where might I undergo such a transformation
myself? I'd love to experience being a zombie!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Mejiro Bright remains entirely oblivious
to the end.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Before I get around to feeling surprised, it takes
me a few moments to realize something's actually
occurring at all, you see...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I might be more surprised if you explain in
advance what's coming. Perhaps you could have
made an announcement, such as, "Five seconds
until the bloody doll."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our exploits aside, the haunted house ends up
becoming a huge hit with the general public.
